articles.title: ‘Where does it end?’: Readers react to gas-powered leaf blower bans
articles.description:

articles.title: What to know about the highly mutated new COVID strain found in Mass. wastewater
articles.description:
Nicknamed the “cicada” variant due to its lengthy hibernation, BA.3.2 derives from a strain that first emerged in late 2021 to 2022.

articles.title: DCF workers who authorized removal of kids in Waltham could stand trial, judge rules
articles.description:
A couple is suing the DCF workers who ordered the seizure of their children. This was done without their consent and despite an investigation finding no evidence of abuse, they say.

articles.title: After mix-up, Matthew Farwell’s lawyers amend court filing, say unnamed person fathered Sandra Birchmore’s unborn child
